title: Avoid identical branch implementations
description: When multiple branches in conditional structures have identical implementations, it indicates duplicate code that should be consolidated. This duplication makes maintenance harder and increases the risk of inconsistent updates.
recommendation: Combine branches with identical implementations or extract common logic into shared functions.

noncompliant.description: Multiple branches with identical implementations indicate duplicate code that should be consolidated.

compliant.description: Combine branches with identical implementations and extract common logic into shared functions.

checks.message: Identical branch implementations detected: Consider consolidating duplicate logic into shared functions or using combined case statements
